testcase.name: findAllStillWorksWhenRedisIsUnavailable

Description:
Parameter 0 of method cacheManager in com.example.usersapi.config.RedisCacheConfig required a bean of type 'org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory' that could not be found.
